# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
- name: cors
  config:
    origins:
    - https://app1.example.com
    - https://app2.example.com
    - https://app3.example.com
    methods:
    - GET
    - POST
    - PUT
    - DELETE
    - OPTIONS
    headers:
    - Content-Type
    - Authorization
    - X-Requested-With
    - Accept
    - Origin
    - User-Agent
    credentials: true
    max_age: 3600
  service:
    id: service-1
    route:
      id: route-1
    config:
      origins:
      - https://app1.example.com
      - https://app2.example.com
      methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      headers:
      - Content-Type
      - Authorization
  route:
    id: route-2
    config:
      origins:
      - https://app3.example.com
      methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - DELETE
  global:
    config:
      origins:
      - https://app1.example.com
      - https://app2.example.com
      - https://app3.example.com
      methods:
      - GET
      - POST
      - PUT
      - DELETE
      - OPTIONS
      headers:
      - Content-Type
      - Authorization
      - X-Requested-With
      - Accept
      - Origin
      - User-Agent
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
- name: key-auth
  config:
    key_in_body: false
    key_in_header: true
    key_name: X-API-Key
    hide_credentials: false
    anonymous: ""
  service:
    id: service-1
    route:
      id: route-1
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: X-API-Key
  route:
    id: route-2
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: X-API-Key
  global:
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_header: true
      key_name: X-API-Key
      hide_credentials: false
      anonymous: ""
- name: rate-limiting
  config:
    limit:
    - 1000
    window_size:
    - 3600
    strategy: "sliding"
    sync_rate: -1
    hide_client_headers: false
    fault_tolerant: true
    namespace: "my-namespace"
  service:
    id: service-1
    route:
      id: route-1
    config:
      limit:
      - 500
      window_size:
      - 3600
      strategy: "sliding"
  route:
    id: route-2
    config:
      limit:
      - 250
      window_size:
      - 3600
      strategy: "sliding"
  global:
    config:
      limit:
      - 1000
      window_size:
      - 3600
      strategy: "sliding"
      sync_rate: -1
      hide_client_headers: false
      fault_tolerant: true
      namespace: "my-namespace"
